subject: Sandile — a small crocodilian Pokemon with dark eye-mask markings, resting in sandy desert terrain
description: A small crocodilian-type creature with distinctive dark bands around its eyes rests in sandy desert terrain, its body low to the ground as if partially submerged in warm sand. The background features a stylized bright sun or sky with orange and yellow hues. The sandy ground is rendered in warm tans and oranges. The creature's dark mask-like eye markings are a clear visual identifier. The overall palette is warm and sun-baked.
foreground: small crocodilian creature with dark eye-mask markings lying in sand
background: sandy desert with stylized sun and warm sky
emotion: watchful, at rest — low-to-ground posture suggests lurking or sunbathing
